title: Arda's Ultimate Golem
description: Arda's Ultimate Golem mod adds a powerful golem to the game, and this golem is a golem that helps you against bosses or creatures you fight.
body:
![UltimateGolemLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0c6073e0e907ef1094f62cf44af9a532121ccaa.png)
![Ultimate Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2b2c30e24d2ea0a259e2fbaec69a49799e9a0c8.gif)
## Geckolib is required for 1.20.1 and above.
# Mod
Arda's Ultimate Golem mod adds a powerful golem to the game, and this golem is a golem that helps you against bosses or creatures you fight. (NOTE: If the player damages the golem, it will also be aggressive towards the player!!)
![block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11bf1b315a1b608c12ec3064b4b7b907bb0e4b74.png)
## Golem Spawn
To create the ultimate Iron Golem, first the iron blocks are arranged as if making a normal golem and finally the final pumpkin is placed in place of the normal pumpkin.
![block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11bf1b315a1b608c12ec3064b4b7b907bb0e4b74.png)
## Versions
### Fabric
- No Support
### Forge
- 1.12.2
- 1.15.2
- 1.16.5
- 1.18.2
- 1.20.1
### versions are supported.
